calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Further Probate Proceedings And For Discharge Of Executrix
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver for (executor) Emilie Noble.

The Court stated that it needs a declaration regarding 9202(a)&(b). Mr. Oliver stated that it was submitted previously with the status report filed 3/30/16 and presented a copy to the Court for review. The Court stated that it will review the document and took the Petition for Termination of Further Probate Proceedings and for Discharge of Executrix under submission and letting counsel know that he will be contacted if a further hearing is necessary.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Termination Of Further Probate Proceedings And For Discharge Of Executrix

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver for Emilie Noble.

The Court stated that it needs a Petition for Final Distribution or a status report on the administration. Mr. Oliver stated that he thought they had filed a status report, that they are having a problem with one of the assets and need a 30 day continuance. The status on close of estate was continued to November 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Apr-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Apr-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gordon Oliver for Emilie Noble. Mazen Salfiti specially appearing for Emilie Noble.

Mr. Oliver reported that he will be substituting out. The Court asked about the petition for final distribution and the failure to appear on January 19, 2016. Mr. Oliver stated that they never received notice, that they had moved and did not submit the new address to the court and that he tried to talk to Ms. Noble and was told that she was hiring new counsel. Mr. Salfiti stated that he met with Ms. Noble last night, that he is not substituting in, that Ms. Noble will be filing a petition for final distribution and would like a 60 day continuance. The Court stated that the petition is way overdue, that the Order to Appear said that she need to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve status report, that it is not willing to grant a long continuance, that this should have been filed in February and is still not on file. Mr. Salfiti stated that Ms. Noble did not receive notice, that he told her this was serious and that she will file a substitution of attorney. Mr. Oliver stated that a substitution of attorney was prepared and sent to Ms. Noble but that they do not know who is representing her. Mr. Salfiti stated that Ms. Noble completed the form and sent it back to Mr. Oliver yesterday. The Court stated that it is not clear that it would approve Ms. Noble coming on without counsel, that it is not appropriate that she should be without counsel, that it will continue the status of filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report to April 5, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court ordered Mr. Oliver and Ms. Noble to make sure that the court has up to date contact information, that Ms. Noble must have a petition on file no later than March 30, 2016, that if she is representing herself the court will look at the appropriateness of the petition and that if the petition is not on file it will need to consider suspension. Mr. Salfiti stated that he did not think she could have it filed by then. The Court stated that is should have already been filed, that the other parties need to know what is going on, that the Order to Appear will also be continued to April 5, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and that if a petition is not filed Ms. Noble must be here, that she had been ordered to be here on February 16, 2016 which was extended to today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Continued To Mar-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Continued To Feb-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the executor Emilie Noble and the Attorney Harry Gordon Oliver to appear on February 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain no appearance was made and why the petition for final distribution or the petition for approval of a status report has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lee. (Not Reported)
